0.text: Bronchial wall thickening in the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Peribronchial reticulonodular densities in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Fibrotic changes in the apices of both upper lobes

4.text: Pneumonic infiltrates in the lower lobes of both lungs
